content_summary: 5 stages of ad mixing evolution: hard rules (2015-2017), heuristics (2017-2019), deep learning (2019-2022), RL (2022-now), LLM (2024-)
Determinantal Point Process theory, greedy DPP implementation, TensorFlow code, A/B test results
Xiaohongshu content+ad mixing architecture, multi-objective ranking (CTR+CVR), dynamic interleaving, frequency control
Douyin RL-based mixing: MDP formulation, Actor-Critic architecture, off-policy learning, adaptive diversity control
50 interview cards: 15 concept questions, 20 design questions, 10 optimization questions, 5 engineering questions
Same 50 cards in Anki format (question\tanswer) for spaced repetition learning
3 innovative project ideas: (1) Multimodal Ad Mixing (2) Contextual Bandits Adaptation (3) Cross-Domain Diversity with Federated Learning
